news.title: Recovery begins for nine missing after two die in Washington tank rupture
news.summary: Authorities say no hope for survivors after tank at paper mill containing a chemical solution imploded The death toll from the tank-rupture incident at a Washington state paper mill on Tuesday rose to two with nine people still missing and presumed dead, authorities said. The Longview fire department said in a statement on Wednesday afternoon that one person who was transported to the hospital following the disaster at Nippon Dynawave Packaging Co on Tuesday morning has died. Continue reading...
